violations.text: Establishment is lacking an allergy statement notifying customers of their obligation to notify staff if they have a food allergy. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/20/2026
The hand-washing sink in the kitchen was lacking paper towels. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/06/2026

Raw animal foods (shelled eggs) were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods (sauces, vegetables) in the reach-in refrigerator. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/06/2026

The sink used for food preparation is lacking an air gap. A direct connection must not exist between the sewage system and a drain originating from equipment in which food is placed. New Violation. Correct By: 02/11/2025
